title: Update figure-led paper plan
summary: Updated the paper plan so the M0020 grid pair is the selected visual spine and reordered next steps around validation, formalization, Monte Carlo, and drafting.

user_inputs.text: User says the corrected grid figures nicely tell the paper's story and asks to update the paper plan and next steps around them.

agent_actions.description: Promoted the residual-noise grid and non-Gaussianity grid from candidate visuals to the organizing figure pair for the paper.
Marked M26 figure design complete and reordered next work as M28 validation, M27 diagnostic formalization, M29 Monte Carlo, then figure-led drafting.
Updated paper plan, paper map, dashboard, task board, workplan, source packet, formal registry, figure/simulation indexes, and logs.
